LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FARABELA KARAPETIAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. PLAINTIFF FILED A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ON DECEMBER 23, 2015. "BECAUSE THERE IS BUT ONE COMPLAINT IN A CIVIL ACTION [CITATION], THE FILING OF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT MOOTS A MOTION DIRECTED TO A PRIOR COMPLAINT. (SEE SYLMAR AIR CONDITIONING V. PUEBLO CONTRACTING SERVICES, INC. (2004) 122 CAL.APP.4TH 1049, 1054, 18 CAL.RPTR.3D 882 [FILING OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT RENDERED MOOT DEMURRER TO ORIGINAL COMPLAINT].)" (STATE COMP. INS. FUND V. SUPERIOR COURT (2010) 184 CAL.APP.4TH 1124, 1131.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FARABELA KARAPETIAN'S Motion To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT FARABELA KARAPETIAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. Plaintiff filed a first amended complaint on December 23, 2015. "Because there is but one complaint in a civil action [Citation], the filing of an amended complaint moots a motion directed to a prior complaint. (See Sylmar Air Conditioning v. Pueblo Contracting Services, Inc. (2004) 122 Cal.App.4th 1049, 1054, 18 Cal.Rptr.3d 882 [filing of first amended complaint rendered moot demurrer to original complaint].)" (State Comp. Ins. Fund v. Superior Court (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1131.)

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
